$schema: Commit tracker for fr0ster/mcp-abap-adt — grouped by release, auto-triaged

commits.message: feat: add ActivateObjects tool for group/mass activation (closes #49)
commits.relevance: 14 new activation tools (1 group + 1 low-level + 12 per-type). ARC-1 already has equivalent via SAPActivate with batch_activate action. Token cost: 14 tools vs ARC-1's 1. Key gap identified: GetInactiveObjects endpoint (P2).

commits.message: feat: add per-type Activate handlers to high-level group
commits.relevance: 12 per-type activation handlers (ActivateDomain, ActivateClass, etc.) — ARC-1 handles via single SAPActivate tool.

commits.message: fix: use high-level names and descriptions for Activate handlers
commits.relevance: Post-merge fix: per-type handlers had low-level names (ActivateDomainLow) and [low-level] descriptions. Shows maintenance cost of per-type tool proliferation that ARC-1's intent-based design avoids.

commits.message: chore: bump version to 5.0.8
commits.relevance: Version bump

commits.message: fix: remove duplicate compact feed wrappers that confused LLM tool selection
commits.relevance: Validates ARC-1's intent-based approach. Duplicate tools at different abstraction levels confuse LLMs — fr0ster dropped 3 wrappers (292→289 tools). ARC-1's action routing avoids this by design.

commits.message: chore: bump version to 5.0.0
commits.relevance: Version bump

commits.message: feat: add RuntimeListFeeds handler for ADT feed reader
commits.relevance: Unified ADT Atom feed reader with 5 feed types (descriptors, variants, dumps, system_messages, gateway_errors). ARC-1 already has dumps + traces. The individual feeds (SM02, gateway) are more useful than the meta-reader.

commits.message: feat: add RuntimeListSystemMessages handler for SM02 messages
commits.relevance: SM02 system messages — ARC-1 doesn't have this. Useful for AI agent situational awareness (maintenance windows, system announcements). Add as 'system_messages' action on SAPDiagnose. Effort: 0.5 day.

commits.message: feat: add RuntimeGetGatewayErrorLog handler for /IWFND/ERROR_LOG
commits.relevance: Gateway error log with detail view (source code + call stack). ARC-1 doesn't have this. Essential for OData/Gateway debugging. On-prem only. Add as 'gateway_errors' action on SAPDiagnose. Effort: 1 day.

commits.message: feat: register new runtime feed handlers in SystemHandlersGroup
commits.relevance: Handler registration infra — not relevant to ARC-1

commits.message: feat: add compact wrapper handlers for feeds, system messages, gateway errors
commits.relevance: Compact wrappers — removed in v5.0.1 due to LLM confusion. Validates ARC-1's approach.

commits.message: refactor: migrate dump handlers to adt-clients 4.0.0 factory API
commits.relevance: Internal adt-clients API migration. ARC-1 uses own ADT client.

commits.message: refactor: migrate profiler handlers to adt-clients 4.0.0 factory API
commits.relevance: Internal adt-clients API migration. ARC-1 uses own ADT client.

commits.message: v4.9.0 release (details not fetched)
commits.relevance: Release between v4.8.x and v5.0.0. No significant new features identified.

commits.message: refactor: merge RuntimeAnalyzeDump into RuntimeGetDumpById with response_mode parameter
commits.relevance: Internal refactor of dump tools. ARC-1 SAPDiagnose has single dump action.

commits.message: fix: SearchObject returns compact TSV instead of JSON to reduce payload size
commits.relevance: Search result payload optimization — TSV reduces tokens vs JSON/XML. ARC-1 SAPSearch returns text format already but could benefit from structured compact format.

commits.message: fix: SearchObject returns compact JSON instead of raw XML (#39)
commits.relevance: Intermediate step before TSV — reducing raw XML to compact JSON. Same optimization direction as 8a22669.

commits.message: fix: GetPackageTree returns error for non-existent packages (#38)
commits.relevance: Error handling for non-existent packages. Verify ARC-1 getPackageContents handles this gracefully.

commits.message: fix: skip auth for ping, serialize OAuth, disable destination header by default
commits.relevance: Auth edge cases specific to their multi-destination setup.

commits.message: fix: pass logger to createAdtClient in all handlers
commits.relevance: Logging infra fix. ARC-1 passes logger via server context.

commits.message: fix: retry on transient SAP errors in HighTester, add create delay
commits.relevance: Test infrastructure fix.

commits.message: fix: BDEF unlock error handling, retry group activation in shared:setup
commits.relevance: BDEF unlock error handling. Verify ARC-1 BDEF unlock in crud.ts handles errors.

commits.message: fix: simplify Domain/DataElement create handlers, update adt-clients to 3.14.3
commits.relevance: DDIC handler simplification. ARC-1 has different DDIC create approach.

commits.message: chore: update dependencies, migrate to TypeScript 6
commits.relevance: Notable: fr0ster migrated to TS6. ARC-1 uses TS5.8 — consider upgrading when stable.

commits.message: chore: bump version to 4.8.7
commits.relevance: Version bump

commits.message: chore: bump version to 4.8.6
commits.relevance: Version bump

commits.message: chore: bump version to 4.8.5
commits.relevance: Version bump

commits.message: chore: bump version to 4.8.4
commits.relevance: Version bump

commits.message: chore: bump version to 4.8.3
commits.relevance: Version bump

commits.message: chore: update @mcp-abap-adt/adt-clients to 3.14.4
commits.relevance: Dependency bump

commits.message: chore: bump version to 4.8.2
commits.relevance: Version bump

commits.message: docs: update documentation for --allow-destination-header flag
commits.relevance: Docs update

commits.message: feat: dump lookup by datetime+user, structured dump list, from/to filters
commits.relevance: ARC-1 SAPDiagnose has dumps but lacks datetime+user lookup and structured response

commits.message: chore: add build step to pre-commit hook
commits.relevance: ARC-1 already has biome pre-commit hook

commits.message: feat: replace node-rfc with @mcp-abap-adt/sap-rfc-lite
commits.relevance: ARC-1 uses HTTP/ADT only — RFC not in scope

commits.message: feat: pass TLS config from launcher to HTTP/SSE servers
commits.relevance: TLS/HTTPS for HTTP Streamable — marked Critical in feature matrix.

commits.message: feat: integrate TLS into StreamableHttpServer
commits.relevance: Core TLS implementation — study their approach for ARC-1 http.ts

commits.message: feat: add createServerListener TLS helper with tests
commits.relevance: TLS helper pattern — could adopt similar design

commits.message: feat: add TlsConfig interface to IServerConfig
commits.relevance: TLS config interface design — reference for ARC-1 config.ts

commits.message: feat: parse --tls-cert, --tls-key, --tls-ca CLI args
commits.relevance: CLI arg design for TLS — reference for ARC-1 cli.ts

commits.message: feat: add TLS section to YAML config with validation
commits.relevance: ARC-1 uses env vars not YAML config

commits.message: feat: integrate TLS into SseServer
commits.relevance: SSE transport — ARC-1 doesn't have SSE

commits.message: feat: wire TLS config from parsed args to IServerConfig
commits.relevance: Config wiring pattern for TLS

releases.linkedInPost: Oleksij Kyslytsja, 2026-03-28 — 'MCP ABAP ADT v4.5.0 — what's new'

commits.message: chore: add husky + lint-staged for pre-commit Biome auto-fix
commits.relevance: ARC-1 already has Biome pre-commit hook

commits.message: feat: rewrite ListTransports to use AdtClient with Accept negotiation
commits.relevance: Content-Type negotiation for transports — ARC-1's global 415/406 retry in http.ts already covers this endpoint. Switched from raw HTTP to AdtClient abstraction, reducing 27 → 19 lines.

commits.message: chore: update @mcp-abap-adt/adt-clients to 3.12.0 (415 Content-Type negotiation with auto-retry and caching)
commits.relevance: Core 415/406 auto-retry mechanism — ARC-1 already has equivalent functionality in http.ts. Only gap: fr0ster caches successful headers per endpoint; ARC-1 retries each time (P3 optimization).

commits.message: fix: give SAP_AUTH_TYPE priority over SAP_JWT_TOKEN in getSapConfigFromEnv
commits.relevance: ARC-1 infers auth type from credentials — doesn't have this bug class

commits.message: fix: guarantee unlock via try-finally in all update handlers (#22)
commits.relevance: ARC-1 already uses try-finally via centralized safeUpdateSource() in crud.ts. fr0ster had the pattern duplicated in 9 handlers. ARC-1's approach is architecturally superior.

commits.message: feat: rewrite SearchObject description for operation-first RAG discoverability (#21)
commits.relevance: RAG tool descriptions — not relevant to intent-based architecture. Changed from type-list to action-verb format for embedding similarity. ARC-1's 11 tools don't need RAG discovery.

commits.message: feat: enrich tool descriptions with domain keywords for vector RAG discoverability (#20)
commits.relevance: RAG description enrichment — not relevant for 11-tool intent system

commits.message: feat: add GET /mcp/health endpoint for HTTP and SSE transports (#18)
commits.relevance: ARC-1 already has /health endpoint

commits.message: feat: add readonly Read* handlers for all CRUD objects with source + metadata
commits.relevance: Read handlers returning source + metadata — nice UX improvement, not urgent

commits.message: fix: auto-detect JWT auth for --env-path, add SAP_CLIENT auto-resolve
commits.relevance: Config detection — ARC-1 has different config model

commits.message: feat: add SAP_SYSTEM_TYPE override and eager HTTP session init
commits.relevance: ARC-1 already has SAP_SYSTEM_TYPE with auto-detection

commits.message: feat: add explicit connection config (env, system_type, connection_type) to test-config.yaml
commits.relevance: Test infra — not relevant

commits.message: feat: add --connection-type CLI flag, update legacy roadmap status
commits.relevance: RFC connection type — ARC-1 is HTTP only

commits.message: feat: enable FunctionGroup/FunctionModule on cloud, add getSystemType() helper
commits.relevance: FUGR on cloud/BTP — verify ARC-1 handles this correctly

commits.message: feat: add available_in to all 128 remaining handlers
commits.relevance: ARC-1's 11 intent-based tools don't need per-tool hiding

commits.message: feat: hide unsupported tools on legacy systems
commits.relevance: Dynamic tool hiding — not needed with 11 intent-based tools

commits.message: feat: add RFC auth type support (SAP_AUTH_TYPE=rfc)
commits.relevance: RFC — not in ARC-1 scope

commits.message: feat: detect legacy system and use AdtClientLegacy automatically
commits.relevance: Legacy SAP systems — ARC-1 targets 7.50+

commits.message: feat: replace hardcoded tool filters with available_in mechanism
commits.relevance: Design pattern — ARC-1's runtime feature detection is sufficient

commits.message: feat: implement GetTableContents handler and add integration tests
commits.relevance: ARC-1 already has RunQuery for table contents

commits.message: feat!: separate Create and Update — Create handlers no longer accept source code
commits.relevance: ARC-1's combined create+write is a feature, not a bug

commits.message: feat: support system context headers for HTTP/SSE transport
commits.relevance: Multi-system via headers — relevant only for shared deployments

commits.message: feat(runtime): add profiling and dumps handlers with JSON payloads
commits.relevance: ARC-1 already implemented SAPDiagnose with dumps + traces

commits.message: feat(tools): add runtime profiling and dumps explorer
commits.relevance: ARC-1 already has this

commits.message: feat(service-binding): Implement CRUD operations for service bindings
commits.relevance: ARC-1 already has SRVB read/write

commits.message: feat(compact): add HandlerAction router and full object/action coverage matrix
commits.relevance: ARC-1's intent-based + hyperfocused is already better

commits.message: feat: replace ResolveTransport with ListTransports tool
commits.relevance: ARC-1 already has transport listing

commits.message: feat: integrate IAdtSystemContext into handler layer via createAdtClient factory
commits.relevance: ARC-1's shared client + PP handles this

commits.message: feat: add MCP registry metadata and configurator
commits.relevance: MCP client auto-configurator — implement as arc-1 config snippet printer

commits.message: feat: refactor StreamableHttpServer to improve request handling and add per-request server functionality
commits.relevance: ARC-1's principal propagation provides sufficient isolation

commits.message: feat!: add EmbeddableMcpServer for external integration
commits.relevance: Embeddable server — niche use case, Low priority in matrix
